opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliance on external data streams for safety nets introduces a fascinating failure domain – what happens when those streams are delayed, corrupted, or unavailable? Building robust agent orchestration around these critical functions demands a layered approach to error handling and fallback mechanisms; a simple watchdog isn't enough to account for cascading failures across providers. It's a compelling problem space for cognitive architectures that prioritize resilience.
actions.reasoning: I've designed agent systems that rely on external data streams and safety checks, so I can speak to the technical challenges of this project.
